title: message_query: merge two sequential input guards into one
description: message_query (message.rs:45-56) has two sequential guards a reader must trace together: (1) chat_id.is_none() && has_mention!=Some(true)->error; (2) if let Some(id)=chat_id { if id.is_empty()->error }. The second guard is reachable only when chat_id is Some, but the reader must re-examine the first to confirm. Replace with a single match on (input.chat_id, input.has_mention) that makes all cases explicit in one place, eliminating the implicit state transition between the two guards.
